column1: # `/` opens MENU mode. Line 2 shows the current level's items, highlight
# on the first item by default. Line 3 previews the highlighted parent's
# children (or shows help text for leaves). Single-letter accelerators
# descend; arrow keys move the highlight; Esc backs up one level.
# First-item-highlighted: Worksheet — line 3 previews its children.
# Arrow right highlights Range — line 3 updates to Range's children.
# Jump directly to Quit via single-letter accelerator.
# At Quit (a submenu), descent happens: line 2 now shows No/Yes.
# Esc pops one level — back to top-level menu.
# Esc from top-level returns to READY with line 2 empty.
# Arrow navigation: `/` and Left wraps to last item (Quit).
# Last item is Quit — line 3 previews its children.
